xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Manufacturing of Carbonated, Non-carbonated beverages and packaged drinking water
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProductOrServiceSoldByTheEntit: Carbonated, Non-carbonated beverages and packaged drinking water
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: End consumers are individuals serviced through Distributors, Retailers, Modern Trade, Hotels, Restaurants, etc.

The Beverage Company Bidco Proprietary Limited (Step down subsidiary)

The pending complaints were resolved in subsequent months
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: Company is a member of Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry, PHD Chamber of Commerce and Industry, Confederation of Indian Industry, The Associated Chambers of Commerce and Industry of India and Action Alliance for Recycling Beverage Cartons. GRI Standards
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: Refer Executive Vice Chairman's Message section (Page 38-39) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: ESG Committee comprising of Executive Vice-Chairman and Two Whole-time Directors
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Code of Conduct, Anti-bribery, Anti-Corruption, FCPA and other policies including POSH, Key Developments, Sustainability Initiatives, Regulatory updates and Review of Policyes and procesures

Code of Conduct, Human Rights, Anti-bribery, Anti-Corruption, FCPA and other key policies including POSH, Key Developments, Sustainability Initiatives, Regulatory updates and Review of Policyes and procesures
Code of Conduct, Human Rights, Anti-bribery, Anti-Corruption, FCPA and other key policies including POSH and health & safety and skill upgradation
Contractual employees and workers Trainings on Health & Safety in manufacturing operations / Units
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: CGST Audit Circle (Amritsar)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Non-reversal of input tax credit
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Revenue Department, Tehsil Chhata, District Mathura
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Keeping water pipeline without permission on Gram Sabha land
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Office of The Superintendent of GST & Central Excise, Maduranthagam I Range / Villupuram Division, Chennai Outer Commisionerate
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Availing input tax credit due to mistake of suppliers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Government of Andhra Pradesh State Tax Department Proceedings of the Deputy Commissioner (ST), Special Circle
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Availing input tax credit due to mistake of suppliers
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Central Ground Water Authority (Jodhpur)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Violation of conditions related to ground water abstraction
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Deputy State Tax Officer (Intelligence), Roving Squad, Dindigul, Tamil Nadu.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Moving goods under an expired E-way Bill
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Assistant Commissioner, Sector 4 (Mobile Squad) Farrukhabad (Fatehgarh), Uttar Pradesh
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Mismatch of material batch number
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Assistant Commissioner, Sector 2 (Mobile Squad-2), Aligarh
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Moving goods under an expired E-way Bill
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Sector 5 (Mobile Squad-12), Kanpur
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Moving goods under an expired E-way Bill
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Karkardooma Court, Delhi
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Violation of certain conditions related to Legal Metrology Act, 2009 in two diffferent cases
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Appellate Authority, Goods & Service Tax, Raipur
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Short payment of tax after scrutiny for FY 2017-18
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Delayed filing of Bill of Entry
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Excise and Taxation Officer, Ward 7, Gurgaon (East), Haryana
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Non-payment of GST under reverse charge mechanism on specified services
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Chief Judicial Magistrate Court, Tirunelveli District
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Violation of provisions related to lifting machines under the Factories Act, 1948 against the Occupier & Plant Manager of the Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Honourable Judge (Senior Division), Labour Court, Ahmedabad
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Violation of certain provisions related to the Payment of Bonus Act, 1965
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Goods and Service Tax Department
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Wrong vehicle number in E-way Bill
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Delayed intimation of import of goods in India
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Joint Commissioner Corporate Circle, Lucknow
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Order passed for demand comprising tax liability of Rs. 8,13,810 and penalty of Rs. 90,840 for short payment of tax in sale of assets, input tax credit disallowed on repair & maintenance of building and travelling expenses
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: Deputy / Asst. Enforcement Officer -Enforcement Squad SGST Department, Kerala (Kayamkulam)

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Delayed filing of Bill of Entry

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Delayed filing of Bill of Entry

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:BriefOfTheMonetaryCaseForPenal: Delayed filing of Bill of Entry

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Varun Beverages Limited and its subsidiaries, affiliates, associates and group companies (collectively referred to as “VBL”), their directors, officers, employees (including part-time and contractors) and suppliers (“Officials”), while acting on behalf of VBL strictly comply with this Anti-Bribery Policy. Officials are prohibited from giving or receiving Bribes to any Government Officials or any other person or entity, including any person or entity in the private or commercial sector, if the payment is intended to induce the recipient to misuse his or her position and thereby give an unfair advantage to VBL. Detailed Policy is available at: https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/23.1-Anti-Bribery-Policy1.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: We strive to make use of renewable energy for our energy requirements and aim to expand our renewable energy portfolio further
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS:
(a) VBL has engaged GEM Enviro Management Limited for phased implementation of 100% recycling of used PET bottles. Headquartered in Delhi, GEM Enviro is a Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) recognised Producer Responsible Organisation (PRO) specialising in collection and recycling of packaging waste and promotion of recycled green products. It makes T-shirts and bags made from recycling of waste material, such as used PET bottles
(b) We are disposing off our E-waste through registered E-waste vendors
(c) We are safely disposing off our hazardous waste through registered vendors

(a) VBL has engaged GEM Enviro Management Limited for phased implementation of 100% recycling of used PET bottles. Headquartered in Delhi, GEM Enviro is a Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) recognised Producer Responsible Organisation (PRO) specialising in collection and recycling of packaging waste and promotion of recycled green products. It makes T-shirts and bags made from recycling of waste material, such as used PET bottles
(b) We are disposing off our E-waste through registered E-waste vendors
(c) We are safely disposing off our hazardous waste through registered vendors

(a) VBL has engaged GEM Enviro Management Limited for phased implementation of 100% recycling of used PET bottles. Headquartered in Delhi, GEM Enviro is a Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) recognised Producer Responsible Organisation (PRO) specialising in collection and recycling of packaging waste and promotion of recycled green products. It makes T-shirts and bags made from recycling of waste material, such as used PET bottles
(b) We are disposing off our E-waste through registered E-waste vendors
(c) We are safely disposing off our hazardous waste through registered vendors

(a) VBL has engaged GEM Enviro Management Limited for phased implementation of 100% recycling of used PET bottles. Headquartered in Delhi, GEM Enviro is a Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) recognised Producer Responsible Organisation (PRO) specialising in collection and recycling of packaging waste and promotion of recycled green products. It makes T-shirts and bags made from recycling of waste material, such as used PET bottles
(b) We are disposing off our E-waste through registered E-waste vendors
(c) We are safely disposing off our hazardous waste through registered vendors
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NotesPrinciple2ExplanatoryText: Quantity not recorded but safely disposed through authorised vendors
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Yes, the Company has multiple mechanisms to redress grievances as per below links as available on the website of the Company. https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/25-Grievance-Redressal-Policy.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/21-VIGIL-MECHANISM-POLICY.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/4-POSH-Policy.pdf

Yes, the Company has multiple mechanisms to redress grievances as per below links as available on the website of the Company. https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/25-Grievance-Redressal-Policy.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/21-VIGIL-MECHANISM-POLICY.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/4-POSH-Policy.pdf

Yes, the Company has multiple mechanisms to redress grievances as per below links as available on the website of the Company. https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/25-Grievance-Redressal-Policy.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/21-VIGIL-MECHANISM-POLICY.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/4-POSH-Policy.pdf

Yes, the Company has multiple mechanisms to redress grievances as per below links as available on the website of the Company. https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/25-Grievance-Redressal-Policy.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/21-VIGIL-MECHANISM-POLICY.pdf https://varunbeverages.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/4-POSH-Policy.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Each plant has primary health centres and restrooms have been established. Periodic inspections are conducted by certified surgeons and auditing organization to confirm that our occupational health and safety systems meet international standards. Since we fall under Food & Beverage category, we are subjected to all industry related audits and surveys to ensure that we are 100% compliant.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: 1. Conducting Safety awareness program frequently 2. Specialized training program for operations/Technicians. 3. Safety audit by Internal/Government officials. 4. Formation of safety committee 5. Periodic Check of equipment's
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: There were no significant risk or concern arising from assessments of health & safety practices and working conditions, however we have undertaken following preventive measures: 1.Formation of Safety Committee to formulate best health & safety practices and working conditions. 2.Safety audit by Internal/ Government officials 3.Specialized training program for Operations/ Technicians 4.Conducting frequent Safety Awareness programs 5.Periodic check of equipment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: Yes-For PF & ESI All the contractors working with us are registered with PF & ESI authorities and they have been allotted separate code number by respective authorities. They are depositing the contributions as and when due and they share back the challans of the deposits made to the authorities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: All the manpower deployed to the factory/Office by various manpower supply companies are governed by the respective labour laws of the state concerned.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Refer "Collaborating for Sustainable Growth" section (Page 44-45) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Refer "Collaborating for Sustainable Growth" section (Page 44-45) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StakeholderGroup: Refer "Collaborating for Sustainable Growth" section (Page 44-45) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Refer "Collaborating for Sustainable Growth" section (Page 44-45) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: We have an internal grievance redressal mechanism through which grievance get redressed. However, if the grievance is not settled by the internal committee then concern person is free to approach the government forum.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: All employees can reach out to management to address their concerns & we also governed by POSH &Grievance redressal mechanism.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: We are strictly following the labour laws in which all above 6 points are covered, so far we have not been prosecuted for any deviations. All employees can reach out to the management to address any significant risks /concerns regarding their work environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: We have had no such concerns in the past. However, all employees can reach out to the management to address any significant risks /concerns regarding their work environment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: No such due-diligence conducted during the year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There have been no such cases
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: Yes, The Company has taken several environmental initiatives which showcases commitment to sustainable practices: 1. Procurement of Energy efficient machines 2. Increase in renewable energy contribution 3. Energy efficient Visi coolers 4. Conduction of Plantation Drive 5. Use of Electric Vehicles for last mile delivery Also, Refer "Driving Ecosystem Resilience: Minimizing our Carbon Footprint" section (Page 72-77) in Sustainability Report
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: We do segregation of all type of waste at source and store wastes in designated areas only. Wastages are closely monitored on daily, weekly and monthly basis and are directly linked with plant KPIs. Approximately more than 90-98% waste (broken glass, plastic bottles, cartons, metal waste etc) goes for recycling. Unit has effective ETP operation combined with aeration and anaerobic system wherein effective operational controls ensures very limited quantity of ETP sludge generation as a hazardous waste. ETP sludge is safely collected in Hazardous waste storage area and finally disposal is done to pollution control board approved TSDF facility for landfill. Unit is not using any toxic chemicals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: Unit does have Disaster/Emergency preparedness and response plan for business continuity. This includes all possible emergencies like Fire, Ammonia or CO2 leakage , any major safety accidents, Chemical leakage, Natural Calamity (flood, cyclone, earthquake) or pandemic situation like Covid 19. To ensure unit readiness plant is also exercising mock drill on six monthly frequency. In past unit has also successfully demonstrated to respond any emergency situation in past. Such one example is to ensure business continuity during Covid times by implementing effective control mechanism to avoid Covid 19 spread. Unit has successfully operated production during pandemic time by adapting all the established measures.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: In order to continously reduce the Company environment footprint, the company is improving efficiencies, especially on critical resources such as Water, fuel and energy, optimizing the resource consumption and minimising wastages, increasing green cover in manufacturing plants and also developing outside establishments. Company also reduced weight of Closures and Preforms over the years to contribute towards environment sustainability. Company also implemented water consumption optimization measures and water recovery and reuse of the water across all plants.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Engaged Gem Enviro Management Pvt. Ltd for phased implementation (upto 100%) recycling of used Plastic Wastes from end users.
Engaged DQS India Pvt. Ltd which verifies water mass balance and we also undertook several other initiatives towards water conservation and water recharge.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Reduced grammage of Plastic Closures and Preforms (used for PET-Bottles) over the years
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Packaging innovations introduced by PIH in India through Global R&D and best practices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: Use of fuels like biomass for steam generation, usage of Solar Energy
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: The company is proactive in adopting new technologies that use cleaner fuels of energy. Commissioned rooftop solar plants in most of our manufacturing plants and entered into open access solar and wind power for few manufacturing locations to increase the renewable energy contribution of our overall electricity consumption and redesigned the power generation units at many locations.
Plants have installed online monitoring Systems in Effluent Treatment Plant as well as Boiler emissions for all time compliance which is being monitored by CPCB on real time basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Effluents are treated and discharged under prescribed limits thereby remain well within the prescribed norms and consent conditions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry
PHD Chamber of Commerce and Industry
The Associated Chambers of Commerce and Industry of India
Action Alliance for Recycling Beverage Cartons
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: There is regular engagement with representatives from key neighbourhood across India. Stakeholders suggestions can also be emailed to the Compliance Officer at complianceofficer@rjcorp.in
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo:
VBL Consumer response programme is developed to promptly resolve consumer concerns & grievances, which ensures that consumer/ customer is responded with courtesy and in timely manner. The Mechanism helps the organization to remain consumer centric, establish top down approach to build trust and strengthen transparency while addressing their queries and concerns: The Complaints are lodged by consumer (via Toll Free no. available on label & crown), arranged and sorted by the PepsiCo Consumer Response System (CRS) representative who then, forwards the same to VBL after logging in on Wilke portal. VBL Plant team & Consumer Care / Complaint Management System (CCMS) coordinator review auto generated email containing relevant details of the Complaint which are then investigated by VBL Plant team, Regional Quality Coordinator (RQC) & CCMS coordinator and the complaint is attended by Customer Relationship Executive (CRE) to address the concern simultaneously. After detailed analysis of each reported complaints by all the plants root cause analysis is carried out and Corrective and Preventive Actions are taken by plant team. Plants then, initiate an improvement plan to mitigate reoccurrence of concern and to pacify & satisfy the consumer.
Feedback: Feedback is sent to PepsiCo CRS team by CCMS coordinator and Pepsi International (PI) Team connects & respond to consumer, subsequently on SOS basis. The Complaints in VBL are tracked and reviewed monthly on the basis of it’s nature, flavour, category and plant
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RemarkForConsumerComplaints: The pending complaints were resolved in subsequent months
The pending complaints were resolved in subsequent months
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: We display all the mandatory product information on the product over as per the requirements of the regulatory authorities.
